release_role: conservative validator/signoff consumer for non-pilot and no-dual-authority safety
required_validation: pytest -q; pytest -q tests/test_wave6_external_shared_facade.py tests/test_m_cache_cli.py tests/test_wave4_protocol_readonly.py tests/test_api_augmentations.py; M_CACHE_SHARED_SOURCE=external pytest -q tests/test_wave6_external_shared_facade.py
evidence_input: central bundle inputs under evidence/candidates/<tag>/consumer/py-sec-edgar-m/: SIGNOFF.json + SIGNOFF.md
blocker_scope: non-pilot or no-dual-authority safety drift, validation failure, pin mismatch, or rollback readiness failure
